global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with bold text and interactive elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start a free trial of MoonScreen.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: A simple logo text 'MoonScreen' appears at the top, styled in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: An abstract arrangement of geometric shapes in varying shades of blue is positioned at the top.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The headline 'Binge starts now' is prominently displayed in bold, white text at the center of the ad.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: The subheadline 'Start free today' is presented in a smaller, white font directly below the main headline.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Book now' is centered at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A large, semi-transparent rectangle is centered in the ad, possibly representing a product or app screenshot.

elements.label: Small shape
elements.description: A small circular shape is positioned at the top left, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A large oval shape is placed in the center, overlapping with other elements.

elements.label: Lower section
elements.description: The lower section of the ad features a large area that may contain additional content or imagery.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now Start free today

elements.label: Secondary text
elements.description: The text 'MoonScreen' appears at the top, likely indicating the brand or service being advertised.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A smaller button with the text 'Book now' is located at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.
